title: Ahmad Jamal stream — late-2022 polymath dump (jazz, crypto, ChatGPT, CS 162)
html:
TL;DR

The single densest note in the first batch — opened 2022-10-25 (titled "ahmad jamal" because Yahir was likely listening to him), modified through Aug 2023, and used as a running junk-drawer for almost a year. Layers, in roughly the order they appear:

  1. Jazz listening cluster: bill evans, louis armstrong, miles davis, john coltrane.
  2. Web3 idea seeds: token-gated websites, digital passports, decentralized Wikipedia, "mobile Web3 game not marketed as web3 but as a regular game," join a DAO next cycle, corvallis crypto club.
  3. Founder mantras: voluntary adversity, nonobvious ("Seek nonobvious things"), asking the right question ("the next best skill to have"), fail forward, "Find the right problem to solve."
  4. chatgpt wedge brainstorming (this is just weeks after launch): customer-service app (flagged obvious), "talking Tom" advice giver as Steve Jobs / Jesus / Jay-Z, dream app (mentioned twice).
  5. Goals: "Buy my mom a house. Have a beautiful connection with a amazing and smart women." Then a self-correction: "^^need to revise this from $ based to mission and problem based to win."
  6. OSU coursework grind: CS 162, CS 271, ECON 830, midterms, "Get github copilot", assembler, BST assignment, problem sets.
  7. Pitches in flight: coinbase slides, DADCO pitch, Escalate, $PHIB ("how to explode PHIB"), Oregon Blockchain Group event, ELI internship.
  8. Personal admin: jo dating thread + an unfinished apology text; emilio's letters; the valeria graduation; sending yesenia editing; calling mom about Sebastian; FAFSA; therapist; insurance; tickets.
  9. PDX agency hit-list: "PixelSpoke / Puppet / Rain the growth / Ride report / Sell wood consulting / The Dyrt / The good / Vacasa / Soba design / Occam advisor / Net rush / Legitscript / Green hammer / Above the fray / Airship / Cadmus / David I Digital." (Looks like an outreach target list.)
  10. Reading list: The Red and the Black, The Savage Detectives, Paul Goodman's Empire City, Borges, Lee Kuan Yew, Paul Graham essay on great work.
  11. Books-to-find / mmt / ubi / Parkinson's law / Balaji's theory as concept tags to come back to.
  12. Voluntary self-tells: "Get a therapist. Start looking at midterms reviews."

Punctuated by dad wisdom: "Impulse decision will kill you — dad."

Key quotes

"Voluntary adversity"

"spend you life force well"

"Giving 100% at most efficient rate: 60mph = 20mpg (long term), 120mph = 10mpg"

"Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have"

"Take existing things if equivalent value, but make them with 1/10 less resources and significantly cheaper"

Why it matters in the graph

This is the bridge note between college Yahir and founder Yahir. Every theme that becomes load-bearing in 2025–2026 — rankett, the , ai search optimization thinking, the nonobvious filter, the bridge-income tradeoff — is already in seed form here.

It also confirms the structural fingerprint: Yahir's notes operate in stacked columns of jazz / crypto / startup / coursework / chores / texts-to-send. Don't treat any one note as monothematic.

Open questions

  • The PDX agency list (PixelSpoke, Vacasa, etc.) — was this a target list for outreach, jobs, or competitive analysis?
  • What was $PHIB? (Likely a memecoin he was working on — note the "Twitter followers / mobile website / LOGOS!!!" cluster.)
  • Did the dream app ever get prototyped, or did it become one of the ?
  • "Ishiki.ai" — single-mention domain, worth checking.
  • Did Yahir end up in therapy after the multiple "GET A therapist" lines?

Wikilinks

ahmad jamal · bill evans · louis armstrong · miles davis · john coltrane · palmer luckey · chatgpt · github copilot · osu · corvallis crypto club · coinbase · emilio · valeria · yesenia · jo · voluntary adversity · nonobvious · dao mergers · dream app · mmt · ubi · asking the right question · dad wisdom · fear of not doing · disruption · rankett · Memory
